name: neb-live-verify
description: Live-verify a NEB defect/fix end-to-end before marking it Ready to test: reproduce the ticket's test steps in the real UI via Chrome MCP as the specified user, instrument the running app (fetch+XHR hook / Angular scope / DB relay), prove the defect AND the fix, then update Plane. Backend curl / DB-only / 'deployed' do NOT count.
